targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) AS value FROM scans s WHERE ('${project:raw}' = '$__all' OR s.project_id::text = '${project:raw}') AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'sbom' AND s.status = 'completed' AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s.findings_count), 0) AS value FROM scans s WHERE ('${project:raw}' = '$__all' OR s.project_id::text = '${project:raw}') AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'sbom' AND s.status = 'completed' AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)

WITH components AS (SELECT jsonb_array_elements(s.output_data->'components') AS c FROM scans s WHERE ('${project:raw}' = '$__all' OR s.project_id::text = '${project:raw}') AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'sbom' AND s.output_data IS NOT NULL AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM components WHERE NOT (COALESCE(c->>'purl','') ~ 'pkg:(rpm|deb|apk|alpine)/') AND COALESCE(c->'licenses'->0->'license'->>'id', c->'licenses'->0->>'expression', '') ~ '(GPL|AGPL)'

WITH components AS (SELECT jsonb_array_elements(s.output_data->'components') AS c FROM scans s WHERE ('${project:raw}' = '$__all' OR s.project_id::text = '${project:raw}') AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'sbom' AND s.output_data IS NOT NULL AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM components WHERE NOT (NOT (COALESCE(c->>'purl','') ~ 'pkg:(rpm|deb|apk|alpine)/') AND COALESCE(c->'licenses'->0->'license'->>'id', c->'licenses'->0->>'expression', '') ~ '(GPL|AGPL)')

WITH components AS (SELECT jsonb_array_elements(s.output_data->'components') AS c FROM scans s WHERE ('${project:raw}' = '$__all' OR s.project_id::text = '${project:raw}') AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'sbom' AND s.output_data IS NOT NULL AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c->>'type') AS value FROM components

WITH components AS (SELECT jsonb_array_elements(s.output_data->'components') AS c FROM scans s WHERE ('${project:raw}' = '$__all' OR s.project_id::text = '${project:raw}') AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'sbom' AND s.output_data IS NOT NULL AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) SELECT COALESCE(c->'licenses'->0->'license'->>'id', c->'licenses'->0->>'expression', 'Unknown') AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM components GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 12

WITH components AS (SELECT jsonb_array_elements(s.output_data->'components') AS c FROM scans s WHERE ('${project:raw}' = '$__all' OR s.project_id::text = '${project:raw}') AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'sbom' AND s.output_data IS NOT NULL AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) SELECT COALESCE(c->>'type', 'unknown') AS type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM components GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10

WITH components AS (SELECT s.config_json->>'target' AS image, jsonb_array_elements(s.output_data->'components') AS c FROM scans s WHERE ('${project:raw}' = '$__all' OR s.project_id::text = '${project:raw}') AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'sbom' AND s.output_data IS NOT NULL AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(image, '.*/', '') AS image, c->>'name' AS package, c->>'version' AS version, c->>'type' AS type, COALESCE(c->'licenses'->0->'license'->>'id', c->'licenses'->0->>'expression', 'Unknown') AS license FROM components WHERE NOT (COALESCE(c->>'purl','') ~ 'pkg:(rpm|deb|apk|alpine)/') AND COALESCE(c->'licenses'->0->'license'->>'id', c->'licenses'->0->>'expression', '') ~ '(GPL|AGPL)' ORDER BY image, license LIMIT 100

list.definition: SELECT name AS __text, id::text AS __value FROM projects ORDER BY name
list.label: Project
list.name: project
list.query: SELECT name AS __text, id::text AS __value FROM projects ORDER BY name
